annotations.description: Key-value pairs used to annotate the AlloyDB instance, providing metadata for organizational or operational purposes.

availability_type.description: Defines the instance's availability type, specifying whether it is zonal or regional; defaults to zonal if not set.

client_connection_config.description: Configuration for client connections, including settings for IP addresses, ports, and authorized networks.

cluster.description: Specifies the cluster to which the AlloyDB instance belongs; must be an existing AlloyDB cluster.

database_flags.description: Specifies custom database flags for the AlloyDB instance, defined as key-value pairs, to configure database behavior.

display_name.description: Human-readable name for the AlloyDB instance, used for easier identification.

gce_zone.description: Specifies the Compute Engine zone where the AlloyDB instance will be created; must match the region of the associated cluster.

instance_id.description: Unique identifier for the AlloyDB instance, must be a valid string that adheres to AlloyDB naming conventions.

instance_type.description: Specifies the type of AlloyDB instance, such as primary or read pool, required for the database cluster.

labels.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize the instance, such as environment or department; must comply with Google's label format constraints.

machine_config.description: Specifies the machine configuration for the AlloyDB instance, including CPU and memory settings.

network_config.description: Specifies the network configuration for the AlloyDB instance, including the network and IP address settings. Must reference a valid VPC network.

psc_instance_config.description: Configuration for a Private Service Connect-enabled AlloyDB instance, specifying settings for private service connectivity.
psc_instance_config.type: list(object({allowed_consumer_projects: optional(list(string)),psc_dns_name: optional(string),service_attachment_link: optional(string),psc_interface_configs: list(object({network_attachment_resource: optional(string)}))}))

query_insights_config.description: Configuration for enabling and customizing query insights, including query string length, query plans, and performance insights.

read_pool_config.description: Defines the configuration for the read pool, including the number of read replicas and their properties, to optimize read performance.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout duration for create, update, and delete operations on the AlloyDB instance.
